title: Tampere Praksis: Service Counsellor and Service Manager Views on Family Service Counselling 2016
description: The data consist of two interviews with staff members of Finnish social welfare offices for families with children: an individual interview with a service manager and a group interview with three case management service counsellors. The interviews took place at two different social welfare offices in Tampere. The data were collected as part of the Tampere Praksis Project.
